title: The Seed Configuration
description: Configuration schema for The Seed network diagnostic tool

oneOf.description: Duration in nanoseconds (Go's default JSON serialization for time.Duration)

SignalThreshold.description: Signal strength thresholds in dBm (typically -100 to 0)

http_redirect_port.description: Port for HTTP to HTTPS redirect (0 = disabled, typically 80)

key_file.description: Path to TLS private key file

email.description: Contact email for Let's Encrypt notifications

staging.description: Use Let's Encrypt staging server (for testing)

fallbacks.description: Fallback interface names to try if default fails

startup_retries.description: Number of retries when finding interface at startup

StaticIP.description: Static IP configuration (required when mode is 'static')

additional_subnets.description: Additional subnets to scan in full_scan or custom mode

arp_scan_workers.description: Number of concurrent ARP scan workers (legacy)

oui_file_path.description: Path to IEEE OUI file for MAC address vendor lookup

oui_max_age.description: Max age before auto-download OUI database (0 = never auto-update)

ipv6_enabled.description: Enable IPv6 Neighbor Discovery Protocol (NDP) scanning

PassiveProtocolConfig.description: Granular control over passive discovery protocols

tcpPorts.description: Comma-separated TCP ports or ranges (used when preset is 'custom')

udpPorts.description: Comma-separated UDP ports or ranges (used when preset is 'custom')

os_detection.description: TCP stack analysis for OS detection

service_probes.description: Banner grabbing and service version detection

test_hostname.description: Hostname to resolve for DNS tests

fhir_endpoints.description: FHIR R4 endpoint tests (Health Checks 100x - Medical)

modbus_endpoints.description: Modbus TCP endpoint tests (Health Checks 100x - Manufacturing)

host.description: Hostname or IP address to ping

name.description: Friendly name for this RTSP stream
Friendly name for this DICOM server
Friendly name for this HL7 endpoint

FHIREndpoint.description: FHIR R4 endpoint test (Health Checks 100x - Medical)

name.description: Friendly name for this FHIR endpoint
Friendly name for this SQL endpoint
Friendly name for this file share

test_read_performance.description: Read test file to measure speed

test_write_performance.description: Write test file to measure speed

test_file_size_mb.description: Size of test file in MB (default: 10)

name.description: Friendly name for this LDAP endpoint

port.description: LDAP port (389 for LDAP, 636 for LDAPS)

name.description: Friendly name for this LTI endpoint
Friendly name for this OPC-UA endpoint

ModbusEndpoint.description: Modbus TCP endpoint test (Health Checks 100x - Manufacturing)

name.description: Friendly name for this Modbus endpoint

test_register.description: Register address to read for testing

server_id.description: Specific speedtest server ID (empty = auto-select closest)

auto_run_on_link.description: Run automatically when link comes up
Run automatically when link comes up

server_port.description: Port for local iPerf server mode

show_public_ip.description: Show public IP address in UI

unit_system.description: Measurement system for distances (sae = feet, metric = meters)

flap_count_24h.description: Number of link flaps in 24 hours

ttfb.description: Time to first byte (server response) thresholds

default_password_hash.description: Bcrypt password hash (empty = requires first-boot setup)

jwt_secret.description: JWT signing secret (empty = will be generated and persisted)

SecurityConfig.description: Security settings for CORS and WebSocket origins

allowed_origins.description: Explicit origins allowed for CORS and WebSocket (empty = RFC 1918 private networks, '*' = all origins)

VulnerabilityScanConfig.description: CVE vulnerability scanning for discovered devices

nvd_api_key.description: Optional NVD API key for higher rate limits

known_servers.description: List of known/authorized DHCP server IP addresses

alert_on_detection.description: Send alert when rogue DHCP server is detected

communities.description: SNMP v1/v2c community strings to try (read-only)

retries.description: Number of retries for failed SNMP queries

max_repetitions.description: Number of OID values returned per GetBulk request. Lower values reduce memory usage on slow devices.

name.description: Friendly name for this credential set

max_size.description: Max MB per log file before rotation

max_backups.description: Number of old files to keep

MCPConfig.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server settings for AI assistant integration

require_auth.description: Require JWT authentication for MCP connections

rate_limit_per_minute.description: Requests per minute per client (0 = unlimited)

allowed_tools.description: Specific tools to expose via MCP (empty = all tools)

DatabaseConfig.description: SQLite database settings for historical data storage

path.description: Path to the SQLite database file

retention_days.description: Days of historical data to retain (0 = forever)

enable_wal.description: Enable Write-Ahead Logging for better concurrency

phases.description: Controls which pipeline phases are enabled
